FabTrack
Sheet Metal Production Manager
v1.0 · © 2026 FabTrack
FabTrack
Version 1.0 · Sheet Metal Production Manager
Production Software
Features
📋
Active Schedule — Real-time TO pipeline sorted by need date, grouped by job
🚛
Load List — Plan deliveries with truck type, time, and driver info
➕
Order Submission — Field crews submit orders that auto-insert into the schedule
🗂
History — Full completed TO archive searchable by job, TO#, or notes
🔔
Callbacks — Track order issues with photos, comments, and resolution status
🎯
Goals & Analytics — Weekly lbs, lbs/hr, and YTD performance tracking
👤
Role-Based Views — Manager, Shop, and Field modes show relevant data only
Daily Updates
📊
Drop your Excel schedule into fabtrack_update.py to refresh all data in seconds
FabTrack · Built for sheet metal fabrication shops · v1.0

Preview
📖 Expected Column Layout
Active TOs Sheet
Col B — TO# (required)
Col D — Sketch / Spool #
Col E — Status (C/L/F/A/NS)
Col G — Size
Col H — LD
Col J — Job Name (required)
Col L — Need Date (required)
Col N — Received Date
Col T — Lbs
Col U — Material / Notes
Completed TOs Sheet
Col A — Completed Date
Col B — TO# (required)
Col D — Sketch / Spool #
Col G — Size
Col H — LD
Col J — Job Name (required)
Col K — Notes
Col L — Need Date
Col T — Lbs
These are the default column positions matching the standard shop schedule format. If your spreadsheet uses different columns, contact your FabTrack administrator to adjust the column mapping.
